referenced_message.content:
Hello, just wanted to inform you about the new SEB version which is about to release. It is important to note that it has not yet been released so this is something you'll have to worry about in the future.

Does it implement a new type of anti-cheat?
Yes, it actually does. It generates a QR code based on your session, some payloads from the .NET but mostly in the virtualized seb_x64.dll. The teacher/proctor will then scan this QR code making it harder for you to cheat as you can't do MITM attacks, now you have to emulate 😏

Is this a threat to Havoc?
No. We are highly experienced and so far their private prototype has not been able to detect Havoc. We are currently investigating whether it is a possible threat in the future. As of now we are the best in the market.

Kind regards,
